ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-06-2009 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/13/09 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET IN DEPT. 502. PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND IS DUE BY 3/10/09; DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE IS DUE BY 3/17/09. STIPULATION RE: PATHOLOGY WAS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW. ORDER RE: PATHOLOGY WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT AND EXPERT DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL JURY SELECTION. G.O. 140 WAS STIPULATED TO. MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 206, JUDGE MCBRIDE, UP TO TRIAL DATE WITH 15 DAYS NOTICE BY E-SERVICE OR HAND SERVICE. IF DISCOVERY IS NOT COMPLETED BEFORE THE FILING OF MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THEN MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE MAY BE HEARD ON SHORTENED TIME. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 3/6/09. ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 3/17/09. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780 (206)
